title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Municipal Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter and Sign Into a Deed of Sale in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for the Acquisition of Two Parcels of Land with an Aggregate Area of Forty-eight Thousand Five Hundred Twenty Square Meters (48,520 SQ.M.) Located in Barangay Anos, Los Baños, Laguna As Relocation Site. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON ,02/15/2022)
